generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and teacher, I've always believed in strong domestic security measures. The recent attacks show we can't afford to be complacent. Our agencies need better tools to keep us safe. Some worry about civil liberties, but we've seen how vital these powers are in stopping threats. We owe it to our children to support our security forces with the tools they need. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
